module:
Custom field types for semantic models.

This module provides custom Django model fields that enhance models with
semantic capabilities, particularly for handling long text content that
needs to be chunked for embedding.

ChunkableTextField.docstring:
A text field that automatically handles chunking for long content.
    
    This field extends the standard TextField but adds functionality to
    automatically chunk content that exceeds token limits for embedding
    models. It works with a related chunk model to store the chunked content.
    
    Example:
        class Article(models.Model):
            title = models.CharField(max_length=200)
            content = ChunkableTextField(
                chunk_model='ArticleChunk',
                max_tokens=1000
            )
            
        # Will generate methods:
        article.get_content_chunks()  # Returns all chunks for this field

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the chunkable text field.
        
        Args:
            chunk_model: The model to use for chunks
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk
            chunking_strategy: Strategy for chunking (string or ChunkingStrategyType)
            strategy_options: Options for the chunking strategy
            *args, **kwargs: Arguments for the parent TextField

deconstruct.docstring:
Deconstruct the field for migrations.
        
        Returns:
            tuple: (name, path, args, kwargs) for field reconstruction

contribute_to_class.docstring:
Add helper methods to the model class.
        
        Args:
            cls: The model class
            name: The name of the field
            **kwargs: Additional arguments

get_chunks_method.docstring:
Get all chunks for this field.
            
            Returns:
                QuerySet: All chunks for this field, ordered by chunk_index

needs_chunking_method.docstring:
Check if the field content needs chunking based on token count and strategy.
            
            Returns:
                bool: True if the field content needs chunking

create_chunks_method.docstring:
Create chunks for this field and store them in the chunk model.
            
            Args:
                processor: Optional processing function for customizing chunking logic
                strategy: Override chunking strategy (string or ChunkingStrategyType)
                strategy_opts: Options for the chunking strategy
                
            Returns:
                list: The created chunk objects
